title: Staff Solutions Engineer - Observo AI
description:
About Us

At SentinelOne, we’re redefining cybersecurity by pushing
the limits of what’s possible—leveraging AI-powered, data-
driven innovation to stay ahead of tomorrow’s threats.

From building industry-leading products to cultivating an
exceptional company culture, our core values guide
everything we do. We’re looking for passionate individuals
who thrive in collaborative environments and are eager to
drive impact. If you’re excited about solving complex
challenges in bold, innovative ways, we’d love to connect
with you.

Location: San Francisco, Seattle, or Los Angeles What Are We
Looking For?

SentinelOne is seeking an experienced and motivated Senior
Sales Engineer with a strong background in sales
engineering, security, and observability tools. This role is
integral to our sales team, acting as the technical expert
and trusted advisor to clients and prospects. You will work
closely with our sales team to understand customer needs,
demonstrate product capabilities, and provide solutions that
align with their security and observability goals.

What Will You Do?

- Collaborate with the sales team to identify and qualify
  sales opportunities by understanding customer requirements
  and pain points.
- Lead technical discussions, product demonstrations, and
  proof-of-concept (POC) initiatives to showcase Observo
  AI’s capabilities.
- Serve as a subject matter expert on Security, Observability,
  SIEM, and Application Performance Management tools,
  translating complex technical concepts into accessible,
  value-driven insights for clients.
- Act as a trusted advisor to prospective customers, helping
  them design and implement solutions that meet their unique
  needs.
- Develop and deliver compelling technical presentations and
  solution architectures tailored to specific customer use
  cases.
- Assist with RFP/RFI responses, ensuring alignment with
  customer requirements and demonstrating a clear
  understanding of their technical needs.
- Help create content Blogs, Use case studies, videos.
- Provide ongoing feedback to the product and engineering
  teams to enhance our offerings based on customer and
  market demands.
- Mentor and guide junior team members, sharing best practices
  and promoting a culture of technical excellence.

What Skills and Knowledge Should You Bring?

- 10+ years of experience in sales engineering, preferably
  with a focus on Security, Observability, SIEM, or
  Application Performance Management tools.
- In-depth knowledge of industry-leading tools and platforms
  in security and observability, with experience in
  solutions such as [Splunk, Datadog, New Relic, Cribl,
  etc.].
- Excellent communication and presentation skills with a
  proven track record of translating complex technical
  information to both technical and non-technical audiences.
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to creatively
  address customer challenges.
- Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and manage
  multiple priorities.
- Self-motivated and ambitious, with a passion for driving
  customer success.
- Experience in working with cloud platforms such as AWS,
  Azure, or Google Cloud.

Why us?

You will be joining a cutting-edge company where you will
tackle extraordinary challenges and work with the very best
in the industry.

- Medical, Vision, Dental, 401(k), Commuter, Health and
  Dependent FSA
- Unlimited PTO
- Industry-leading gender-neutral parental leave
- Paid Company Holidays
- Paid Sick Time
- Employee stock purchase program
- Disability and life insurance
- Employee assistance program
- Gym membership reimbursement
- Cell phone reimbursement
- Numerous company-sponsored events, including regular happy
  hours and team-building events

This U.S. role has a base pay range plus commissions that
will vary based on the location of the candidate. The range
posted here is the on-target earnings (OTE) for this
position, inclusive of base salary and commissions. For some
locations, a different pay range may apply.  If so, this
range will be provided to you during the recruiting process.
You can also reach out to the recruiter with any questions.

On Target Earnings

$216,000—$297,000 USD

SentinelOne is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity
and Affirmative Action employer. We do not discriminate
based upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender
(including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical
conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender
expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an
individual with a disability, or other applicable legally
protected characteristics.

SentinelOne participates in the E-Verify Program for all
U.S. based roles.
responsibilities: Collaborate with the sales team to identify and qualify sales opportunities by understanding customer requirements and pain points
Lead technical discussions, product demonstrations, and proof-of-concept (POC) initiatives to showcase Observo AI's capabilities

Serve as a subject matter expert on Security, Observability, SIEM, and Application Performance Management tools, translating complex technical concepts into accessible, value-driven insights for clients
Act as a trusted advisor to prospective customers, helping them design and implement solutions that meet their unique needs
Develop and deliver compelling technical presentations and solution architectures tailored to specific customer use cases
Assist with RFP/RFI responses, ensuring alignment with customer requirements and demonstrating a clear understanding of their technical needs
Provide ongoing feedback to the product and engineering teams to enhance our offerings based on customer and market demands
Mentor and guide junior team members, sharing best practices and promoting a culture of technical excellence
use_cases: Security threat detection and monitoring using AI-powered observability
Application Performance Management (APM) for cybersecurity environments
SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) integration and optimization
Log management and analysis for security operations centers
Observability across security infrastructure and cloud platforms
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a Sales Engineer role focused on demonstrating and
selling Observo AI's existing security and observability
products. The role involves acting as a technical advisor,
conducting POCs and demos, and designing solution
architectures for customers, but does not include building,
training, or deploying AI models - it supports AI products
by selling them.
